nasb.text: Eliud was the father of Eleazar, Eleazar the father of Matthan, and Matthan the father of Jacob.

esv.text: and Eliud the father of Eleazar, and Eleazar the father of Matthan, and Matthan the father of Jacob,

cnv.text: 以律生以利亞撒，以利亞撒生馬但，馬但生雅各，

ccb.text: 以律生以利亚撒， 以利亚撒生马但， 马但生雅各，

csbs.text: 以律生以利亚撒， 以利亚撒生玛坦， 玛坦生雅各，
